# Generic Patterns Catalog

> Normalized from 994 raw styles into reusable generic templates.
> AI picks the matching pattern, fills in placeholders, done.

### Edge Templates (copy-paste)

#### E1: default | width=1 | solid | arrow (used 200x)
```
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0.455;entryY=0.003;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;
```

#### E2: default | width=2 | solid | arrow (used 128x)
```
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1
```

#### E3: default | width=1 | solid | no-arrow (used 67x)
```
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=none;endFill=0;
```

#### E4: default | width=1 | dashed | no-arrow (used 66x)
```

```


| # | fontSize | Bold | Template |

| T2 | 24 | yes | (see below) |
| T3 | 24 | no | (see below) |
| T4 | 18 | no | (see below) |
| T5 | 18 | yes | (see below) |
| T6 | 16 | no | (see below) |
| T7 | 16 | yes | (see below) |
| T8 | 14 | no | (see below) |
| T9 | 14 | yes | (see below) |
| T10 | 13 | yes | (see below) |
| T11 | 12 | no | (see below) |
| T12 | 12 | yes | (see below) |
| T13 | 11 | no | (see below) |
| T14 | 11 | yes | (see below) |
| T15 | 10 | no | (see below) |
| T16 | 10 | yes | (see below) |
| T17 | 9 | no | (see below) |
| T18 | 9 | yes | (see below) |
| T19 | 8 | yes | (see below) |
| T20 | 8 | no | (see below) |
| T21 | 7 | no | (see below) |
| T22 | 6 | no | (see below) |

#### T1: fontSize=48, bold=yes
```
text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontSize=48;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;textShadow=0;shadow=0;glass=0;
```

#### T2: fontSize=24, bold=yes
```
text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1
```

```

```

```
text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontSize=18;

```

### ellipse (62 variants)

```
ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fontSize=15;
```

### image (87 variants)

```
shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;
```

```

```

